title: Length Unit Converter - Meters, Feet, Inches & More
description: Free length unit converter. Convert between meters, feet, inches, centimeters, kilometers, miles, and more.
keywords: length converter, unit converter, meters to feet, cm to inches, km to miles
intro: Convert between all common length units: meters, feet, inches, centimeters, kilometers, miles, yards.

faq.q: How many feet in a meter?
faq.a: 1 meter = 3.28084 feet. To convert meters to feet, multiply by 3.28084.

faq.q: How many cm in an inch?
faq.a: 1 inch = 2.54 centimeters. To convert inches to cm, multiply by 2.54.
